raw_consumer_statement: Someone misrepresented himself as an airline representative, on the phone. He said he was booking airline tickets for me for XXXX XXXX airline. I gave him my credit card, then he started asking for verification codes from the credit card company. I thought that was strange, he said it was for " my protection ''. They told me to log into my credit card app and " approve a purchase ''. I've never been asked to do that, but I followed instructions. I was billed {$2900.00}. I found out that the person on the phone was NOT a XXXX XXXX XXXX representative at all toward the end of the call and I demanded that he refund the money. He promised to refund the money. I never received the airline tickets he supposedly booked. I never received a refund. The person misrepresented himself as an airline agent. When I disputed the charge with Citi card, they found for " we've completed the investigation '' and said I needed to contact the merchant directly. In other words, they did not side with me in this dispute. The " merchant '' is a fraud. When I called the " merchant '' back on XX/XX/year>, he said he issued the credit on XX/XX/year>, the same day the charge was made ; then he told me to call this other number if I had any problems. That number was out of order. This is a total scam and Citi should be helping me with this!
